testcase.name: test_dine_does_not_introduce_cake_topics

failure.message:
AssertionError: FAIL: DINE pillar introduced 'birthday' - pillar bleed! assert 'birthday' not in 'since mojo’...ducts below.'
'birthday' is contained here: since mojo’s birthday is just 2 days away on **14 february**, this is a great time to settle into a routine that keeps him feeling good and also lets you plan his celebration calmly. ? ++++++++
before i lay out a simple daily structure, i want to respect his safety: mojo is **allergic to chicken**, so i’ll keep all suggestions completely **chicken‑free**....
...Full output truncated (7 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_profile_first_questioning.py:147: in test_dine_does_not_introduce_cake_topics assert topic not in mira_response, f"FAIL: DINE pillar introduced '{topic}' - pillar bleed!" E AssertionError: FAIL: DINE pillar introduced 'birthday' - pillar bleed! E assert 'birthday' not in 'since mojo’...ducts below.' E E 'birthday' is contained here: E since mojo’s birthday is just 2 days away on **14 february**, this is a great time to settle into a routine that keeps him feeling good and also lets you plan his celebration calmly. E ? ++++++++ E E before i lay out a simple daily structure, i want to respect his safety: E mojo is **allergic to chicken**, so i’ll keep all suggestions completely **chicken‑free**.... E E ...Full output truncated (7 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show

testcase.name: test_dine_pillar_no_cake_unless_requested

failure.message:
AssertionError: FAIL: DINE response mentions birthday assert 'birthday' not in 'since mojo’...s stomach?**'
'birthday' is contained here: since mojo’s **birthday is just 2 days away**, this is a lovely moment to keep lunch light, safe, and happy for him. ? ++++++++
because he has a **chicken allergy**, i’ll avoid anything with chicken. ...
...Full output truncated (16 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_profile_first_questioning.py:485: in test_dine_pillar_no_cake_unless_requested assert "birthday" not in mira_response, "FAIL: DINE response mentions birthday" E AssertionError: FAIL: DINE response mentions birthday E assert 'birthday' not in 'since mojo’...s stomach?**' E E 'birthday' is contained here: E since mojo’s **birthday is just 2 days away**, this is a lovely moment to keep lunch light, safe, and happy for him. E ? ++++++++ E E because he has a **chicken allergy**, i’ll avoid anything with chicken. E ... E E ...Full output truncated (16 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show
